title: E8/Niemeier/Leech Closure
status: Formal refinement draft for peer-review-facing development
central_thesis: Use high-dimensional lattice analogs as closure templates for transport without claiming global universality before local derivation.

claims.primary_content: The local code chain (1, 3, 7, 8, 24) with powered terminal 72 = 8 x 9 is a verified lattice closure template. Leech landing, Gamma72 polarization, and closure-chain uniqueness remain separate audit boundaries.
claims.required_action: Add separate landing theorems only when explicit Leech glue, Gamma72 polarization, or cold-start fingerprint verifiers are present.

math.primary_content: Use the paper body axioms, lemmas, and formalism as the math intake.
math.required_action: Promote every symbolic statement into a normalized claim row with assumptions and receipts.

formal_algebra_calculus.required_action: Split normal form, closed form, algebraic operators, calculus/window operators, and open obligations.

hand_work.primary_content: Use 03-CQE-workbook/WORKBOOK.md plus the analog toolkit guides.
hand_work.required_action: Write the physical reconstruction steps and boundary-collision handling for the paper.

code_rebuild.required_action: Bind a replayable command or mark the missing executable as an obligation.

lib_bindings.required_action: Resolve this binding into production/lib-forge or mark it as an adapter route.

tests_and_receipts.primary_content: Paper 08 includes production/formal-papers/CQE-paper-08/lattice_closure_template_receipt.json, verifying the lattice code chain, Fano/Hamming identity, extended Hamming/E8 seed, Golay ingredient boundary, powered 72 = 8 x 9 sheet bound, Gamma72 transport boundary, and rejection of Leech/Gamma72 overclaims.
tests_and_receipts.required_action: Add broader tests only when later papers claim a closed Leech landing, Gamma72 polarization action, or closure-chain uniqueness theorem.

deployment_kernel.primary_content: Deployable individually as CQE-paper-08 and selectable through the master suite.
deployment_kernel.required_action: Expose paper, block, and suite selectors with no duplicate routing logic.
